name: Vessel Magnetic Charging Cable 2.0
summary: With an improved Gen-2 magnetic connector, this upgraded cable ensures a stronger hold, smoother alignment, and more efficient power delivery.
description: With an improved Gen-2 magnetic connector, this upgraded cable ensures a stronger hold, smoother alignment, and more efficient power delivery. This charging cable is designed exclusively for Vessel devices that use the official proprietary magnetic USB connection. For safety and optimal charging performance, only Vessel-branded magnetic cables should be used. Third-party magnetic chargers may not be compatible or safe. Keeps your device charged and ready.
